code: export class GangMembersParser{constructor(){this._members=[];}flush(){this._members=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){this._members.push({userId:wrapper.readInt(),username:wrapper.readString(),rankId:wrapper.readInt(),rankName:wrapper.readString(),figure:wrapper.readString()});}return true;}get members(){return this._members;}}
